ns0:entry.ns0:title: CyberTimon/RapidRAW
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CyberTimon/RapidRAW
Language: typescript
A beautiful, non-destructive, and GPU-accelerated RAW image editor built with performance in mind.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DayuanJiang/next-ai-draw-io
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DayuanJiang/next-ai-draw-io
Language: typescript
A next.js web application that integrates AI capabilities with draw.io diagrams. This app allows you to create, modify, and enhance diagrams through natural language commands and AI-assisted visualization.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: InsForge/InsForge
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/InsForge/InsForge
Language: typescript
The all-in-one, open-source backend platform for agentic coding. InsForge gives your coding agent database, auth, storage, compute, hosting, and AI gateway to ship full-stack apps end-to-end.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Lum1104/Understand-Anything
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Lum1104/Understand-Anything
Language: typescript
Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OneUptime/oneuptime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OneUptime/oneuptime
Language: typescript
Complete open-source monitoring and observability platform.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Stirling-Tools/Stirling-PDF
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Stirling-Tools/Stirling-PDF
Language: typescript
#1 PDF Application on GitHub that lets you edit PDFs on any device anywhere

ns0:entry.ns0:title: can1357/oh-my-pi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/can1357/oh-my-pi
Language: typescript
⌥ AI Coding agent for the terminal — hash-anchored edits, optimized tool harness, LSP, Python, browser, subagents, and more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: clash-verge-rev/clash-verge-rev
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/clash-verge-rev/clash-verge-rev
Language: typescript
A modern GUI client based on Tauri, designed to run in Windows, macOS and Linux for tailored proxy experience

ns0:entry.ns0:title: code-yeongyu/oh-my-openagent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/code-yeongyu/oh-my-openagent
Language: typescript
omo; the best agent harness - previously oh-my-opencode

ns0:entry.ns0:title: colbymchenry/codegraph
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/colbymchenry/codegraph
Language: typescript
Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local

ns0:entry.ns0:title: heygen-com/hyperframes
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes
Language: typescript
Write HTML. Render video. Built for agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: humanlayer/12-factor-agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/humanlayer/12-factor-agents
Language: typescript
What are the principles we can use to build LLM-powered software that is actually good enough to put in the hands of production customers?

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/azure-devops-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/azure-devops-mcp
Language: typescript
The MCP server for Azure DevOps, bringing the power of Azure DevOps directly to your agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rmyndharis/OpenWA
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rmyndharis/OpenWA
Language: typescript
Free, Open Source, Self-Hosted WhatsApp API Gateway

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rohitg00/agentmemory
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rohitg00/agentmemory
Language: typescript
#1 Persistent memory for AI coding agents based on real-world benchmarks
